mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.name, p.phone, p.id_card AS idCard, p.gender, p.birthday, p.relation, p.address, p.is_default AS isDefault, p.create_time AS createTime FROM user_patient p WHERE p.status = 1
AND p.user_id = #{q.userId}
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.name}, '%')
ORDER BY p.is_default DESC, p.create_time DESC
